title: Recovery mnemonic passed as CLI arg is visible in process list
description:
In `DidCommands::Recover`, the BIP-39 mnemonic is passed via `--mnemonic` CLI arg (cli.rs:196). This makes the 24-word recovery phrase (which IS the private key) visible to any user on the system via `ps aux`, `/proc/$PID/cmdline`, shell history, and process accounting logs.

Should accept the mnemonic from stdin (like `cmd_admin` does for passwords via `rpassword_fallback()`) or from a file descriptor, never as a command-line argument.

Affected: src/cli.rs:192-196, src/cli.rs:1017
